title: GHZ
description: GHZ state preparation and verification benchmark. Constructs a GHZ state on the device using a BFS spanning tree of the device connectivity, then estimates fidelity via direct fidelity estimation (DFE), parity oscillation curve fitting, or compressed sensing (random-phase parity sampling with sparse spectrum recovery by L1 minimization).

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'GHZ' for this schema.

num_qubits.description: Number of data qubits for the GHZ state.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

method.description: Verification method: 'dfe' (2 circuits, fast, lower-bound fidelity), 'parity_oscillation' (many circuits on a uniform grid over [0, 2π), curve-fit amplitude), or 'compressed_sensing' (~5·ln(N) circuits at random phases on [0, 2π); coherence and the dominant oscillation frequency are recovered by LASSO over a cosine basis, so it also witnesses the actual GHZ size).

num_phases.description: Number of phase points for the oscillation-style methods. Ignored for DFE. Defaults to 20 for parity_oscillation (dense enough to fit cos(Nφ+θ)) and to ceil(5·ln(N)), at least 6, for compressed_sensing.

seed.description: Seed for the random phase draw used by compressed_sensing, for reproducible dispatches. Ignored by other methods.

num_flag_qubits.description: Number of flag qubits for error detection via ZZ stabilizer checks. Set to 0 to disable.
